source_name: NBA.com official public team pages; manual non-official UI accent palette; manual curation of 4-player tiny pilot roster
license_notes: Team identity data (names, abbreviations, conference/division alignment) is publicly available factual information for non-commercial demonstration. Visual metadata uses non-official UI accent colors only — these are NOT official NBA or team brand colors, NOT Pantone specifications, and do NOT imply NBA or team endorsement. Tiny pilot player identity and roster membership data (4 players across 2 teams) is manually curated from public NBA.com player/roster pages; birthdate/height/weight intentionally omitted for pilot. No logos, player contracts, salaries, or cap sheets included. Third-party salary data requires separate licensing.
freshness_label: Pre-offseason team list + non-official UI accent colors + 4-player tiny pilot roster (as of 2026-06-28)
freshness_policy: Static curated snapshot. No auto-refresh. Does not satisfy live eligibility prerequisites (no provider authorization beyond public team pages, no auto-refresh, no real-time timestamp). This is not live/current/latest data. Tiny pilot roster is frozen as-of pilot verification only.
data_freshness_warning: This snapshot contains 30 NBA team identity records, non-official UI accent visual metadata, and a 4-player/2-team tiny pilot player identity + roster membership dataset as of 2026-06-28. Pilot data is identity + roster membership only: no contracts, salaries, cap sheets, injuries, scouting, or live status. Accent colors are manual UI differentiation colors only — NOT official team or NBA colors. It does not contain full rosters, contracts, salaries, cap sheets, or logos. It is not live data; do not use for trade/signing recommendations.
limitations: Teams metadata, non-official UI accent visual metadata, and 4-player tiny pilot identity + roster membership only
Pilot covers exactly 2 teams (OKC, DEN) and 4 players; not a full roster
No contract, salary, cap, injury, scouting, or live data
Birthdate/height/weight intentionally null for pilot players
Visual metadata uses non-official UI accent colors for badge differentiation
No team logos, official branding, official colors, Pantone specifications, or brand guidelines are included
No official NBA or team endorsement is implied by the visual metadata or pilot roster
Not live data; does not reflect transactions after 2026-06-28
Do not use for trade/signing recommendations

normalized/player_identities.json.source_name: Manual curation from NBA.com player pages cross-checked with ESPN public rosters
normalized/player_identities.json.data_freshness_warning: Frozen as-of pilot source verification only; not current/live NBA data; do not use for trade/signing recommendations.

normalized/roster_memberships.json.source_name: Manual curation from NBA.com team roster pages cross-checked with ESPN public rosters
normalized/roster_memberships.json.data_freshness_warning: Frozen as-of roster membership pilot only; not a live/current roster.

allowed_usage: Non-commercial demonstration and internal review. Team identity data, non-official UI accent colors, and tiny pilot player/roster metadata only. Pilot data is identity + roster membership only with no contracts/salaries/cap/injury/live data. Accent colors are for UI badge differentiation and are not official brand colors. Not for use as official NBA data source. Preview-only system; no execution of trades or signings. Do not use pilot data for trade/signing recommendations.
redistribution_notes: Team names, abbreviations, conference/division alignment are factual NBA organizational structure. Non-official UI accent colors are manually chosen palette values for UI differentiation — they are NOT official team or NBA colors, NOT Pantone specifications, and do NOT convey endorsement. Tiny pilot player identity and roster membership data is manually curated from public NBA pages with only identity/roster facts included; birthdate/height/weight omitted for pilot. No NBA logos, official fonts, branded visual assets, contracts, salaries, or cap sheets are included in this snapshot. Future data additions (full rosters, contracts, salaries) must comply with individual source licenses.
